g.text: Food Ordering System - Class Diagram (Annotated for Interview)
Trace: "User searches 'pizza', sorts by rating, adds to cart, places order, pays, tracks delivery, rates restaurant."
"User opens the app. Client only calls
and rating — all behind one API."
name match AND within 5km AND cuisine=Italian.
"Cart items become an Order. Order is the
restaurant, rider notified at each step (
Search: by name, cuisine, location, or chained
Sort: by rating, price, distance, delivery time
Add to cart, place order via Builder
Customer, restaurant, delivery agent all notified
Pay via CreditCard / UPI / Wallet / COD
Rate restaurant 1-5 stars, feeds back into sort
